ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content submission */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content piece */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the content piece */,
  "num_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated from user engagement */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the content piece */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes on the content piece */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video, tutorial) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the content thumbnail */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's profile was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content piece the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content piece engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the content */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., vote, share) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content piece being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., delete, flag) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderation action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., member, moderator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content piece */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the content piece */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "badge_name")
)
